name: Watercress Rice Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup wild rice -OR use a brown and wild rice mixture of your own
Bunch or two of watercress (I suppose you could also use spinach)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice, wild rice, and any chosen rice mixture according to package instructions. Add extra water during cooking to ensure the rice remains slightly soupy upon completion.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, add the cooked beans (kidney, garbanzo, and black). Sauté for about 5 minutes until warmed through.
3. Add minced garlic, salt, pepper, rosemary, sage, and watercress to the skillet with the beans. Stir to combine.
4. Cover and cook on low heat for another 5-10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld without overcooking the vegetables.
5. Divide hot rice mixture evenly onto plates or bowls.
6. Top each serving with a generous handful of chopped cilantro and watercress leaves.
Serve immediately and enjoy your hearty Watercress Rice Beans dish.
